full_description: WalkBuddy is a walking tracker app that encourages users to stay active and explore their surroundings. It provides a fun and interactive way to track daily walks and discover new routes. With WalkBuddy, you can set goals, track progress, and compete with friends to make walking a enjoyable and social experience. The app also includes features such as route planning, distance tracking, and personalized recommendations to help you stay motivated and engaged. Whether you're a casual walker or an avid hiker, WalkBuddy is the perfect companion to help you get the most out of your walks and improve your overall health and wellbeing.
